type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Total Particulate Matter emissions calculations have been reviewed for 2020. We confirm that the reported quantities calculated based on the 2020 Petrinex data as well as equipment specs and operating hours provided by Tourmaline are correct.
The emissions difference between 2020 and 2019 was because of a significant increase in the amount of flaring in 2020, also different engine emission factors were used in 2020.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
PM10 emissions calculations have been reviewed for 2020. We confirm that the reported quantities calculated based on the 2020 Petrinex data as well as equipment specs and operating hours provided by Tourmaline are correct.
The emissions difference between 2020 and 2019 was because of a significant increase in the amount of flaring in 2020, also different engine emission factors were used in 2020.

The emissions difference between 2020 and 2019 was because of a significant increase in the amount of flaring in 2020, also different engine emission factors were used in 2020.
